title: We need to send a guy to Japan
display_title: We need to send a guy to Japan
wikitext:
[]: We need to send a guy to Japan.....             Quote Post by V » Thu Oct 11, 2007 1:05 pm ....with a video camera subtley hidden inside of a giant novelty hat.

[]:             Quote Post by DatDude » Thu Oct 11, 2007 1:07 pm I tried I was stopped at the airport . . . .

[]:             Quote Post by marmotgirl » Thu Oct 11, 2007 2:18 pm It's gone very quiet on the Rebuild front, hasn't it? ... *waits for the dramatic inevitability of someone popping out with a fansub NOW*

[]:             Quote Post by EvaCub » Thu Oct 11, 2007 9:43 pm It has been really quiet Mah friend's trip to Japan was canceled could have got her to film it definetly

[]:             Quote Post by wildarmsheero » Fri Oct 12, 2007 8:32 am If you pay for my ticket and hotel I'll do it.

[]:             Quote Post by The Eva Monkey » Fri Oct 12, 2007 8:49 am wildarmsheero wrote: If you pay for my ticket and hotel I'll get myself arrested.

[]:             Quote Post by Defectron » Fri Oct 12, 2007 12:53 pm This is some hard core suspense waiting for this, any moment now somebody here is going to crack under the pressure and go on a rampage like a beserk eva eating peoples faces! Yeah any moment now...

[]:             Quote Post by wildarmsheero » Fri Oct 12, 2007 3:00 pm The Eva Monkey wrote: wildarmsheero wrote: If you pay for my ticket and hotel I'll get myself arrested.

[]:             Quote Post by Operation Yashima » Sat Oct 13, 2007 2:01 pm You guys sound serious... Does anybody know when the DVD version (Japanese would be fine) is coming out? Normally the fansub groups work on those more willingly. As soon as the DVD is released we can probably expect a sub in about a week after.

[]:             Quote Post by JP » Sat Oct 13, 2007 2:10 pm The actual movie begins with cutesy characters reminding the audience that bootlegging is evil, and beware the fines, etc, I heard. Not exactly a confidence builder for anyone who walked in ready to do it. PS how did the rough fan-thing of Yashima get made? I'm not too familiar with that video, but I'd imagine you need more than photographic memory from what you just saw in a theater for a fan to recreate that whole deal.

[]:             Quote Post by EvaCub » Sat Oct 13, 2007 2:18 pm JP wrote: The actual movie begins with cutesy characters reminding the audience that bootlegging is evil, and beware the fines, etc, I heard.

[]:             Quote Post by Ornette » Sat Oct 13, 2007 2:22 pm JP wrote: The actual movie begins with cutesy characters reminding the audience that bootlegging is evil, and beware the fines, etc, I heard. Not exactly a confidence builder for anyone who walked in ready to do it.

[]:             Quote Post by NAveryW » Sat Oct 13, 2007 2:37 pm Is this thread really necessary with a thread just like it right below it?

[]:             Quote Post by chee » Tue Oct 16, 2007 12:29 am I'm just quietly waiting in this corner for a fansub of a DVD-rip....you'll see, la la la-(head-butts wall)

[]:             Quote Post by Gendo'sPapa » Tue Oct 16, 2007 12:33 am It took PAPRIKA 6 months to leak a DVD Rip online.... I'm hoping that they'd want to get the Eva 1.0 DVD out before 2.0 hits screens. So let's just hope it doesnt take 4 1/2 more months.

[]:             Quote Post by chee » Tue Oct 16, 2007 12:36 am And the Paprika R1 DVD release STILL hasn't occurred, even though it was promised for July...then September...now November.... Back on topic, you'd think at least SOME devious bastard would have put out a screener by now...

[]:             Quote Post by Mr. Tines » Tue Oct 16, 2007 1:20 am chee wrote: And the Paprika R1 DVD release STILL hasn't occurred

[]:             Quote Post by Krennn » Tue Nov 06, 2007 11:18 am JP wrote: The actual movie begins with cutesy characters reminding the audience that bootlegging is evil, and beware the fines, etc, I heard. Not exactly a confidence builder for anyone who walked in ready to do it.

[]:             Quote Post by Victorthebattousai » Tue Nov 06, 2007 12:28 pm If you guys will pay me to go to Japan, I'll do anything you ask. I'll bootleg it, I'll steal the film, I'll bribe an usher, whatever it takes. Just pay for the ticket. And a hotel. It could be an ugly hotel. I don't care. *begs*

[]:             Quote Post by Wevangeliwon » Tue Nov 06, 2007 3:29 pm For my cinema, it was just some text with a small picture with a camera then a diagonal line through it. Anyway, at the rate the horrible quality raw will come out, I think we might have to.
